name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-4
title: /rabbit-config subcommand list unification
description: The /rabbit-config command file and the rabbit-config skill description declare the available subcommands independently. After adding allowed-tools and bash-allow (BACKLOG-1), these two lists can drift. Unify them so there is a single source of truth for the subcommand list — either generate the skill description from the command file, or validate them against each other in CI/test.

history.note: Superseded by RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-11 which covers subcommand list unification as part of the full /rabbit-config SKILL.md implementation.
